'''Illiv Orfa''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. During her time on Mustafar, she stole a serpent-like crystal from a sleeping [[Mustafarian/Legends|Mustafarian]]. The Mustafarian, [[Ikt]], hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to hunt her down and retrieve his crystal. While the spacer was investigating where the Mustafarian had been camped, the spacer stumbled upon a strange altar where Orfa appeared. The spacer attempted to bargain with Illiv for the crystal. However, Orfa became angry and attacked the spacer with her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], but she was outmatched and was killed in the duel.

==Behind the scenes==
Illiv Orfa appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

[[File:Illiv_Orfa.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Illiv Orfa wielding her lightsaber]]
